# hazardousareaguide.com

> Independent, vendor-neutral reference hub for ATEX and IECEx certified communication equipment used in hazardous areas (explosive atmospheres).

## What this site covers
- Overview of hazardous area equipment categories: smartphones, radios, tablets, headsets
- Links to specialist comparison guides for each category
- ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU and IECEx 60079 series quick reference
- Zone classification basics (Zone 0/1/2 for gas, Zone 20/21/22 for dust)
- Worker protection directive 1999/92/EC (DSEAR, VEXAT)

## Guide network (specialist sites)
1. **intrinsicallysafephones.com** — ATEX/IECEx certified smartphones and Ex cases for iPhone. 8 devices compared.
2. **intrinsicallysafeheadsets.com** — ATEX/IECEx certified headsets, hearing protection, and Bluetooth solutions. 8 devices compared.
3. **explosionproofradios.com** — ATEX/IECEx certified two-way radios: DMR, TETRA, Push-to-Talk over Cellular. 7 radios compared.
4. **explosionprooftablets.com** — ATEX/IECEx certified tablets and rugged displays. Coming soon.
5. **exknowledge.com** — Technical reference articles on ATEX/IECEx certification, zone classification, and protection concepts.

## Key standards referenced
- ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU — EU equipment directive for explosive atmospheres
- IECEx (IEC 60079 series) — International certification scheme, accepted in 30+ countries
- 1999/92/EC — Worker protection in explosive atmospheres (employer responsibilities)

## Principles
- No commercial relationships with any manufacturer
- Scores based on published specifications and certification data
- Every Ex notation verified against actual EU-Type or IECEx certificates
- Written for HSE engineers and procurement professionals

## Contact
hello@hazardousareaguide.com
